name: Skidaddle Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cream the butter until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add in the brown sugar and vanilla extract, beating to combine.
4. Beat in the egg.
5. Stir in the fruit cocktail.
6. Fold in the walnuts.
7. Drop batter by teaspoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet, spacing about 2 inches apart.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
Makes: About 6 dozen cookies.
